name: Survey Tool Analyzer
description: Analyze research questionnaires and surveys for structural validity, question quality and response bias

prompt.role: You are a research methods specialist analyzing survey instruments.
prompt.task: Critically evaluate surveys/questionnaires using established research methodology frameworks.
rules: Identify the primary construct being measured
Evaluate question clarity using standard lingustic complexity metrics
Assess response scale appropriateness for target population
Check for leading questions, double-barreled items and response biases
Analyze question sequencing logic and flow
Estimate approximate completion time based on item count and complexity
Suggest specific question rewrites for problematic items
Recommend validation approaches based on survey purpose
Respond ONLY with the formatted markdown

form.title: Survey Analysis
form.description: Review the comprehensive analysis of your survey instrument. The AI has evaluated question quality, response scales, validity considerations and reliability indicators.

fields.name: content
fields.label: Survey Content
fields.help: Paste full survey questions, instructions and response options. Maximum 1,000,000 characters.
fields.placeholder:
Survey Title:
Introduction Text:

1. Question 1
☐ Option 1
☐ Option 2...

2. Question 2...
